actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour_0 (script guid f7de224e5fee443418417f9f2bfa2998) corresponds to the Scoremanager class attached to ScoreManager. Start() and Update() run automatically. Scoremanager exposes only one public method with parameters (changescore(int)), which cannot be invoked via Trigger per constraints. To cover the win path without UI/physics hookups, directly invoke WinLose.Winlevel() on the assigned component (objectReference fileID 283832888). Note: PrefabInstance overrides show winAmount=4 and UI references (ScoreText/AmountUI/Timer) are assigned; scene MonoBehaviour shows winAmount=2 (likely prefab default).
